Title: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants
Writer: Pam Brady, Matt Lieberman, Marc Ceccarelli
Actors: Tom Kenny, Clancy Brown, Rodger Bumpass
Plot: Desperate to be a big guy, SpongeBob sets out to prove his bravery to Mr. Krabs by following the Flying Dutchman, a mysterious swashbuckling ghost pirate, to the deepest depths of the deep sea.
